response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack/web engineer, but the profile fundamentally mismatches this embedded security role. He lacks the required native-level Japanese, has no demonstrated Linux kernel analysis or modification experience, and shows no background in network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) or L2/L3 switch development. His C experience is limited to a brief 7-month stint, far from the strong UNIX/C proficiency required.
strengths: Broad, long software engineering career with strong testing/TDD culture
Some C/C++ experience (NI LabWindows/CVI) and low-latency systems work in DLang
Linux familiarity and dev-ops/CI infrastructure experience
concerns: No Linux kernel, embedded networking, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP/NETCONF)
Career centered on web/full-stack TypeScript/Node.js, not embedded firmware in C

key_factors.factor: Solid general engineering and Linux background
